title: Responsive Aspect Ratio Card

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Aspect Ratio Card

Create a fluid media card maintaining custom crop layout ratios dynamically.

### Requirements:
1. **Aspect Ratio Grid**: Render cards with visual mockups preserving 16:9 banner dimensions across variable widths.
2. **Image fitting**: Set background/image scaling matching card borders without clipping layouts.
3. **Content placement**: Set details/titles text columns below banners cleanly.

constraints: Must implement css aspect-ratio properties or equivalent padding hacks
Grid wrapper width must adapt automatically without static pixel definitions

starterCode.html:
Card Title

Aspect ratio description banner.

gradingCriteria.description: Verify visual banner maintains strict 16:9 aspect ratios upon container resizing.
Verify title and text padding are placed cleanly below the media header.
